headline: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
summary: Prime Day offers unprecedented discounts on Apple products. The Apple Watch Series 11 reaches a new low price. AirPods Pro 3 are also discounted to $179.

headline: Android 17’s new foldable gaming mode could make flippy phones more fun
summary: Android 17 introduces a dedicated gaming mode for foldable phones. It features a virtual gamepad with touch controls on half the screen. This mode aims to enhance gaming on flippy devices.

headline: YouTube updates Shorts to make it even more like TikTok
summary: YouTube Shorts is implementing new TikTok-like features. A new 'clear screen' mode removes icons and text from videos. The 'thumbs-up' button will be replaced with a 'heart' icon.

headline: OpenAI will delay GPT-5.6 after Trump administration request
summary: OpenAI is delaying the full release of its GPT-5.6 model. The Trump administration requested the delay due to security concerns. CEO Sam Altman confirmed a limited preview would launch first.

headline: Cape Fear Episode 5 Recap and Review – 'Faith'
summary: Episode 5 of Cape Fear, 'Faith', suffers from mid-season pacing issues. Despite stellar acting, the plot stalls out. The episode concludes with a wild, jaw-dropping ending.

headline: Sword Sage: Awakening is an Action-RPG that Does Away with Dodge-Rolling | IGN Preview
summary: Sword Sage: Awakening features a unique, Bruce Lee-inspired combat system. The action-RPG eschews traditional dodge-rolling mechanics. It focuses on an innovative evade and counter system.

headline: The LEGO Polaroid OneStep SX-70 Camera Is on Sale for the Last Day of Prime Day
summary: The LEGO Polaroid OneStep SX-70 Camera is currently on sale. This special offer is available for the final day of Prime Day. It's a unique collectible for fans of photography and LEGO.

headline: EOFY 2026: Grab the Gigabyte A16 16-inch Gaming Laptop for $600 Off
summary: The Gigabyte A16 16-inch Gaming Laptop is available with a $600 discount. This is a special End of Financial Year (EOFY) deal. It offers significant savings for gamers.

headline: King Charles becomes first monarch to reveal tax bill
summary: King Charles has become the first British monarch to disclose his tax bill. He paid £12.9m in tax for the 2024-25 financial year. This places him among the UK's top 100 taxpayers.

headline: King and Queen will not live in Buckingham Palace after renovations
summary: King Charles and Queen Camilla will not relocate to Buckingham Palace. They will continue residing at Clarence House. The decision comes after extensive renovations to the palace.

headline: Chris Mason: The anatomy of the prime minister's downfall
summary: Political editor Chris Mason analyzes the prime minister's recent downfall. The PM lost the capacity to govern effectively. This mirrors the fates of predecessors Liz Truss and Boris Johnson.

headline: Boy, 14, charged with murder after body found in search for girl in south Wales
summary: A 14-year-old boy has been charged with murder. The charge follows the discovery of a body in south Wales. The body was found during the search for a missing 14-year-old girl named Lilly.
